message:
fix: revert ResizeObserver, use fit on active tab switch (#107)

ResizeObserver was causing blank terminals by calling fit() on
terminals still initializing. Revert to window resize listener
and add fit() in the active tab effect so terminals fill the
viewport when switched to. Also use requestAnimationFrame for
initial terminal fit instead of setTimeout(50) for more reliable
layout timing.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@kubestellar.io>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
